title: 菊花賞の後に・恐るべし福の壁

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright puts up a good fight, but she's
unable to beat Matikanefukukitaru.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, she's proven she can manage
long-distance races as well as medium. Now we
have to decide which category she should focus
on.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We decide Mejiro Bright should compete in the
Stayers Stakes as another test of her potential as
a stayer.
